response.justification: Solid full-stack engineering career spanning ~15 years across diverse domains, but the role requires Director-level IC depth in AI/ML strategy and recognized AI expertise, which the resume does not demonstrate. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP and agent tooling work at re:cinq; there is no evidence of building AI products at scale, cloud platform strategy, or advising strategic customers on AI adoption.
strengths: Long tenure across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at scale
Founder experience with GISCollective shows entrepreneurial ownership
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, teaching, public talks
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product or platform expertise at the level required
Senior IC level, not Director/Principal scope or influence
No cloud platform strategy or strategic customer advisory experience

key_factors.factor: AI expertise gap vs. recognized-expert bar
